component.name: BMZ Player
component.summary: BMS player for LunaticRave2 and beatoraja style charts

description.p: BMZ Player is a BMS player aiming for compatibility with LunaticRave2 and beatoraja style play, skins, scoring, and replay workflows.
The Flatpak package includes the default BMZ skin, bundled compatible skins, and a sample playable chart for smoke testing.
